doc_title: Context-Aware Learning to Rank with Self-Attention

items.evidence_span: Deep Listwise Context Model (DLCM) was proposed in [1]

items.fact: Qingyao Ai, Keping Bi, Jiafeng Guo, and W. Bruce Croft. 2018. Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement.
entities: Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement
items.evidence_span: [1] Qingyao Ai, Keping Bi, Jiafeng Guo, and W. Bruce Croft. 2018. Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement.

items.fact: Qingyao Ai, Xuanhui Wang, Sebastian Bruch, Nadav Golbandi, Mike Bendersky, and Marc Najork. 2019. Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks.
entities: Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks
items.evidence_span: [2] Qingyao Ai, Xuanhui Wang, Sebastian Bruch, Nadav Golbandi, Mike Bendersky, and Marc Najork. 2019. Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks.

items.fact: The paper cites 'Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement' [1].
entities: Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement

items.fact: The paper cites 'Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks' [2].
entities: Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks

items.fact: The paper cites 'Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement' [1].
entities: Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement
items.evidence_span: In this work, we propose a learnable, context-aware, self-attention [31] based scoring function, which allows for modelling of interitem dependencies not only at the loss level but also in the computation of items' scores.

items.fact: The paper cites 'Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks' [2].
entities: Learning Groupwise Multivariate Scoring Functions Using Deep Neural Networks
items.evidence_span: Unlike RNNs [16], it does not process the input items sequentially but allows the model to attend to different parts of the input regardless of their distance from the currently processed item.

items.fact: The paper cites 'Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement' [1].
entities: Learning a Deep Listwise Context Model for Ranking Refinement
